name: skill-maintainer
description: Bilingual maintainer workflows for engineering AI Skills and auditing their release quality.

interface.shortDescription: Create repository-standard Skills and audit them before release.
interface.longDescription: Skill Maintainer provides a controlled workflow for creating one repository-standard bilingual AI Skill and a strictly read-only workflow for auditing Skill, Pack, plugin, activation, safety, and generated-output quality before release.
defaultPrompt: Create one repository-standard bilingual AI Skill.
Audit this Skill for release quality without editing it.
